claims.claim: `BridgeState` tracks telemetry/sensory lane freshness, safety state, lane traces, and WebSocket metrics used by `bridge_reciprocity_v1`.
`bridge_reciprocity_v1` should transition from bidirectional waiting/recent states to `bidirectional_stale_telemetry` when telemetry age exceeds the stale window.
Clock skew should be visible as a truth channel so local/future timestamps do not get confused with ordinary network latency.
Malformed telemetry and safety-drop accounting should be observable without automatically escalating global safety state or causing a live reconnection/control retune.
